meta.title: Todd Miller — Software Engineer
meta.description: Results-driven software engineer with 10+ years of experience building performant web applications, developer tools, and distributed systems.

hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.headline: Results-driven software engineer with 10+ years of experience
paragraphs: building performant web applications, developer tools, and distributed systems. Currently contracting as a tech lead at Marketplace AI.

Previously led platform upgrades and feature integrations at Bridgestone, mentored teams at Landi Industries, and built research tooling at Kenda. I care about clean code, fast systems, and thoughtful developer experience.
When not coding, you'll find me running my Proxmox-based homelab, building CI/CD pipelines in Gitea Actions, or exploring new frameworks.

jobs.summary: Tech lead driving team velocity, subsystem design, and CI/CD for a Node-based NX monorepo.
highlights: Assessed and communicated risk, led team ceremonies, and instilled shared ownership as Tech Expert / Team Lead.
Set up and manage a Node-based NX monorepo with consolidated dependency management to increase team velocity.
Own subsystem design, tooling, integrations, and CI/CD pipelines end-to-end.
Engineered a custom post-quantum encryption system for AWS S3 using microservices.
Responsible for interviewing, training, and supporting team members.

jobs.summary: Led legacy-to-modern platform integrations and the first cross-framework upgrade since 2020.
highlights: Led large feature integrations of legacy software into a modern web platform, including tire-wear analysis, tread meshing, and a result visualization engine.
Directed global strategy for a platform upgrade across Node, Python, Docker, and other core systems — the first upgrade since 2020.
Evaluated strategies, estimated cost, and designed the initial approach to a new internal rules engine.
Designed and implemented a new pluggable client-graphics system to improve app performance, team velocity, and future feature development.

jobs.summary: Technical and team lead for six developers shipping a sustainable MVP on a legacy multi-client platform.
highlights: Led a team of six developers: distilled requirements, planned stories, scoped sprints, and drove sprint goals.
Communicated roadblocks, technical achievements, and approach philosophy to clients to build trust and transparency.
Mentored developers on testable, low-maintenance features in line with delivering a sustainable MVP.
Discovered security vulnerabilities in a client's platform authentication layer, later confirmed by pen-testing.
Implemented the first end-to-end tests for a legacy multi-client platform to attack growing technical debt.
Conducted business-critical technical spikes and evaluations of tooling and frameworks to reduce development costs.

jobs.summary: Core contributions to the global tire-design geometry engine, yielding 100x speedups and ~91% process time reduction.
highlights: Designed and oversaw large-scale feature implementations across a multi-national team.
Core contributions and optimizations to the global tire-design geometry engine produced multiple 100x speed improvements and ~91% overall core process time reduction.
Developed and tested critical algorithms enabling designers to leverage the full potential of the tool.
Prepared and delivered technical presentations to minimize system maintenance costs and enhance peer training.

jobs.summary: Full-stack engineering platform for automated and assisted engineering analysis.
highlights: Planned, developed, tested, and deployed a full-stack environment for automated and assisted engineering analysis.
Designed, implemented, and documented a RESTful API for current and future integration with CATIA and other internal applications.
Automated and improved analysis of test results for development engineers.
Mentored team members on program architecture and Pythonic philosophy.

jobs.summary: NVH and simulation engineering for vehicle development.
